items.title: Without the assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand, Kareem’s sky hook would have been unlikely to ever exist
items.author: Pickleskennedy1
items.body_excerpt: If the Assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand of Austria-Hungary never happens, the chain of events leading to the start of WWI is likely broken. Without World War I, there is no Treaty of Versailles, whose punitive terms helped produce economic conditions that contributed to…

items.title: Inside my latest notebook: “I think this is going to be a great summer for Franz,” #Magic president of basketball operations Jeff Weltman told @orlandosentinel.com. “He’s going to get a lot of good work done.”
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
Inside my latest notebook: “I think this is going to be a great summer for Franz,” #Magic president of basketball operations Jeff Weltman told @orlandosentinel.com. “He’s going to get a lot of good work done.”

On Wagner, Sean Sweeney and more: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/06/20/o...

media.title: Magic notebook: Sweeney’s experience, Wagner update, staff philosophy
media.description: Magic president of basketball operations Jeff Weltman shared more details with the Orlando Sentinel about the search to hire Sean Sweeney.
